title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 313.845 - Rules, procedure
text:
313.845.  Rules, procedure. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 313.800 to 313.850 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1991 H.B. 149 § 21 Adopted by Referendum, Proposition A, November 3, 1992, A.L. 1993 S.B. 10 & 11 § 21, A.L. 1994 S.B. 740, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
